_meta.note: Auto-generated for 34 Casa Companion heroes. Edit motion_prompt per hero for best results.

default.name: Hero
default.motion_prompt: subtle living motion: gentle breathing, soft blink, hair or fabric swaying in a light breeze, alive and natural
default.negative_prompt: frozen still, no movement, blurry, distorted, warping, jitter, slide-show effect
